form.formComment: Last start by a head as favourite (Sr4) at this track (2:31.80) beating Snip Of Beauty in 3yo+ NR 40 to 44 on March 18 at $3.80. Has a low draw and is a leading player.

form.formComment: Gave plenty of ground last start when well beaten into ninth behind Rock Hammer at Albion Park over 1660m in a 4yo+ NR 50 or better on March 14 at $10. Performed better the start before where he won by 1.1 m as favourite when quickly away, (Fr1) at this track (2:09.50) beating Real Tin Tin in 3yo+ NR 48 to 55 on March 5 at $1.70. Expected to go well.
